properties.displayName: GENMIN AS-SNTL-004-2 Limite de ingesta diaria superada
properties.description: Se detecta que el límite diario ha sido sobrepasado por la alerta configurada en LogAnalytics
properties.query:
Operation
| where Detail has 'OverQuota'
| project TimeGenerated, Operation = OperationStatus, EventType = Detail, EventSubType = OperationKey, Object = OperationCategory
